mnemonics.title: Collective Operations Categories
mnemonics.content: B-S-G-R-AR: Broadcast, Scatter, Gather, Reduce, Allreduce - Remember as 'Big Systems Gather Resources And Respond'

mnemonics.title: Reduction Operations
mnemonics.content: SMP LBB: Sum, Max, Product, Logical AND, Bitwise AND, Bitwise OR - Remember as 'Simple Math Problems Let Brains Bloom'
